B 84, 085204 (2011), doi:10.1103/PhysRevB.84.085204, arXiv:1107.5288. kappa computed within the relaxation-time approximation (RTA); the paper's Eq. 17 and text state the conductivity is calculated within RTA, the iterative/full Boltzmann solution being attributed to Broido et al.
